_invalid_because: Canonical annotations require a non-empty identifier. Phoenix upserts by (name, target, identifier) and defaults it to the empty string, so an omitted identifier can overwrite or merge human/model/code judgments that share a name and target. This one omits identifier, so it matches neither the logical nor the Phoenix wire shape.
name: decomposition_quality
label: pass
explanation: Issues are executable and dependencies are native relations.
